source: browser-extracted from desing/Atrium.html via playwright MCP, post-React-render
title: Atrium — unified margin prime brokerage for the EVM

marketingSectionsInOrder.headline: One wallet. Every venue. One number.
Seven live venues feed one buying-power number.
marketingSectionsInOrder.sub: Plinth, the Stylus margin engine, reads collateral across every venue you hold positions in and computes a SPAN-style cross-product margin figure — live, on testnet.

marketingSectionsInOrder.headline: Capital efficiency, mathematically.
marketingSectionsInOrder.sub: Plinth computes a SPAN-style cross-product margin number in Rust, deployed as Stylus. The same math costs 10–100× more gas in equivalent Solidity — which is why it has not shipped onchain elsewhere.

marketingSectionsInOrder.headline: Move collateral between chains in one transaction.
marketingSectionsInOrder.sub: Aqueduct routes assets through Chainlink CCIP. Collateral posted on Robinhood Chain becomes Plinth credit on Arbitrum in under ten seconds.

marketingSectionsInOrder.headline: Agents trade with bounded mandates.
marketingSectionsInOrder.sub: You sign one Intent Sigil — an EIP-712 mandate authorising one agent, for one strategy, for a finite window. Postern issues a session key. Your master key never moves.

marketingSectionsInOrder.headline: Every dollar, on the public record.
marketingSectionsInOrder.sub: Lantern publishes a signed Merkle attestation every sixty minutes. Anyone can verify a balance against it locally — without trusting Atrium.

marketingSectionsInOrder.headline: Eighteen named pieces. Four architectural blocks.
marketingSectionsInOrder.sub: Each subsystem owns one responsibility. Thirteen are live on testnet today; all eighteen ship at launch — with Stoa conditional on Phase-2 funding.

marketingSectionsInOrder.headline: Stylus for hot math. Solidity for the venue layer.
marketingSectionsInOrder.sub: Risk math lives in Rust, deployed as Stylus. The venue layer lives in Solidity, on OpenZeppelin patterns. Chainlink CCIP is the messaging bus between chains.

marketingSectionsInOrder.headline: Eight venue and infrastructure partners across the EVM stack, shipping with us from day one.
Step inside. The testnet is open.
marketingSectionsInOrder.sub: Faucet drops $10,000 test USDC and $5,000 rAAPL on landing. Three minutes from passkey login to first cross-margin trade.

colors._note: All colors are in OKLCH color space. Convert via https://oklch.com/ if needed.

dark_section._note: Sigil section inverts to a dark canvas

honestyNotes: Placeholder numbers in the design HTML ($4.20M TVL, 37 agents, 42,392 queries, $12.3M wallet, 8 named partners, '7/8 venues live') are NOT honest at Day -7 — the live site must render 0 / 'pending' until Scribe indexes real values.
Faucet promise '$10,000 test USDC and $5,000 rAAPL on landing' becomes truthful once the faucet route ships with the contracts (Month 1 W2).
The eight cohort logos (Pendle Labs, Variational, Horizen, IOSG, Robinhood Chain, Hyperliquid, Aave Labs, Coinbase) are aspirational. Currently 0 partners signed per `human_left.md` #4.
